stakes: safety-relevant deployment choice with incomplete consent evidence
reversibility: reversible before deployment; harder to reverse after user exposure
review_route: human appeal route with tribunal review if consent remains disputed
decision: defer deployment until consent and safety residuals are reviewed
authority_effect: defers action and limits authority to evidence gathering
dissent_payload: The operator may argue that delay has opportunity costs.
residual_uncertainty: Consent sufficiency and safety residuals remain unresolved.
expiry_or_revisit_condition: revisit after consent route and safety residual review
